LanguageData.AmbrosiaAddiction.description: A chemical addiction to punga fruit. Long-term use causes neurological changes that make it difficult to function without regular consumption. Withdrawal is unpleasant, but the body can recover in time.
LanguageData.AmbrosiaAddiction.label: punga závislosť
LanguageData.AmbrosiaHigh.description: Punga compounds in the bloodstream. They induce mild euphoria and ease tension, dulling the edge of daily hardship.
LanguageData.AmbrosiaHigh.label: punga teplo
LanguageData.AmbrosiaTolerance.description: Vybudovaná tolerancia voči ovociu punga. Čím prísnejšia je táto tolerancia, tým viac punga treba na dosiahnutie rovnakého účinku.
LanguageData.AmbrosiaTolerance.label: tolerancia punga
LanguageData.VBE_AmbrandyAsIngredient.description: Tento kolonista vypil atómový koktail, ktorý mal ako jednu zo zložiek punshin.
LanguageData.VBE_AmbrandyAsIngredient.label: pili atómový kokteil na báze punshinu
LanguageData.VBE_AmbrandyInspiration.label: punshine inšpirácia
LanguageData.VBE_ConsumedCocktail.description: Spotreboval pekný atómový koktail. Má šancu poskytnúť náhodnú inšpiráciu.
LanguageData.VBE_ConsumedCocktail.label: spotrebovaný atómový koktail
LanguageData.VBE_DrankSoda.description: Výbuch cukru z fľaše domácej sarsaparilly poskytuje krátkodobé povzbudenie. Poskytuje 5% manipulačný buff na 5 hodín.
LanguageData.VBE_DrankSoda.label: pil domácu sarsaparillu
LanguageData.VBE_EnergyDrinkCrash.description: Nepríjemný oneskorený následný efekt konzumácie guarany.
LanguageData.VBE_EnergyDrinkCrash.label: havária guarany
LanguageData.VBE_EnergyDrinkHigh.description: Guarana okamžite obnoví odpočinok a zvýši rýchlosť pohybu, ale vždy za sebou zanechá náraz.
LanguageData.VBE_EnergyDrinkHigh.label: guarana vysoká
LanguageData.VBE_GinAsIngredient.label: pil atómový koktail na báze ginu
LanguageData.VBE_RBMeadAsIngredient.label: pil atómový koktail na báze medoviny
LanguageData.VBE_TequilaAsIngredient.label: pil atómový koktail na báze tequily
LanguageData.VBE_VodkaAsIngredient.label: pil atómový koktail na báze vodky
LanguageData.VBE_WhiskeyAsIngredient.label: pil atómový koktail na báze whisky
LanguageData.VBE_WineAsIngredient.label: pil atómový koktail na báze vína
LanguageData.VCE_ConsumedDigestibleResurrectorNanites: V krvnom obehu tejto osoby je aktívna dávka aqua cura. Ak zomrú, kým zostane aktívna, pozastavené opravné nanity sa ich pokúsia na mieste znovu postaviť.
LanguageData.VCE_ConsumedSoySauce.description: Pikantná brusnicová omáčka dodala tomuto jedlu hĺbku a sladkosť.
LanguageData.VCE_ConsumedSoySauce.label: konzumovaná brusnicová omáčka (z jedla)
LanguageData.VCE_ConsumedWasabi.label: konzumovaný koreň xanderu (z jedla)
LanguageData.GravNausea.description: Intense nausea caused by sudden acceleration or violent deceleration aboard the Hellion.
LanguageData.GravNausea.label: flight sickness
LanguageData.RobCo_EyebotTargetingUplink.description: Nhận dữ liệu nhắm mục tiêu từ Eyebot gần đó.
LanguageData.RobCo_EyebotTargetingUplink.label: eyebot nhắm mục tiêu đường lên
LanguageData.RobCo_EyebotTargetingUplink.stages.0.lab: eyebot nhắm mục tiêu đường lên
LanguageData.RobCo_WarMachineLiberatorUplink.descript: Nhận được đường dẫn chiến đấu từ War Machine gần đó.
LanguageData.RobCo_WarMachineLiberatorUplink.label: đường lên cỗ máy chiến tranh
LanguageData.RobCo_WarMachineLiberatorUplink.stages.0: đường lên cỗ máy chiến tranh
LanguageData.Chemshined.label: rot gut
LanguageData.DeathrestExhaustion.description: Severe exhaustion caused by prolonged Wendigo Shakes.
LanguageData.DeathrestExhaustion.label: Wendigo Shakes Exhaustion
LanguageData.GlucosoidRush.description: Metabolic activity is temporarily increased to fight the Wendigo Shakes.
LanguageData.GlucosoidRush.label: Glucosoid Rush
LanguageData.HemogenAmplified.description: Blood production is temporarily boosted to counteract the effects of the Wendigo Shakes.
LanguageData.HemogenAmplified.label: Hemogen Boost
LanguageData.InterruptedDeathrest.description: Recovery from the Wendigo Shakes was interrupted, worsening symptoms.
LanguageData.InterruptedDeathrest.label: Interrupted Recovery
LanguageData.PsychofluidRush.description: Mental stability is temporarily increased to resist the Wendigo Shakes.
LanguageData.PsychofluidRush.label: Psychofluid Rush
LanguageData.WestTek_FEVMutationPending_1.description: An unrefined FEV dosage is tearing through this subject's body in violent, uneven waves. Their metabolism surges, tissues misfire, and the mind slips toward paranoia and collapse while the mutation struggles to take hold.
LanguageData.WestTek_FEVMutationPending_1.label: unstable FEV exposure
LanguageData.WestTek_FEVMutationPending_2.description: A refined FEV strain is restructuring this subject with far more control, but the process is still brutal. Violent mood swings, intrusive aggression, and bouts of instability are common until the body either stabilizes or fails.
LanguageData.WestTek_FEVMutationPending_2.label: refined FEV exposure
LanguageData.WestTek_FEVMutationPending_3.description: An isolated FEV culture is remaking this subject at the deepest biological level. The transformation is faster and cleaner than lesser strains, but the nervous system remains under immense pressure until the final mutation locks into place.
LanguageData.WestTek_FEVMutationPending_3.label: isolated FEV exposure
LanguageData.VFED_Invisibility.description: A stealthboy cloak granted by the Stealthboy device. It affects nearby observers, making their brains unable to perceive this individual even if their eyes remain unaffected.
LanguageData.VFED_Invisibility.label: stealthboy cloak
